repo.description: Marketing site for MonGPT, an AI chat + voice support agent targeting Asian markets with multilingual capabilities. Next.js 16 static export on Cloudflare Pages featuring 25+ free SEO tools, a docs hub, and 8 localized locales with edge geo-redirect.

cards.title: Add security headers to Cloudflare middleware
cards.rationale: Edge middleware serves zero security headers — site is exposed to clickjacking and MIME sniffing.
bullets: Keep existing geo-locale redirect logic unchanged

cards.title: Add mobile navigation menu to header
cards.rationale: Nav links use hidden md:flex — mobile visitors cannot reach Pricing, Tools, or Docs.
bullets: Add hamburger toggle for screens below md breakpoint
Reuse existing nav items from Header.tsx links array
Keep LocaleSwitcher and Start CTA visible at all widths

cards.title: Add unit tests for markdown and URL utilities
cards.rationale: Zero test files in repo — pure converter functions in toMarkdown.ts are completely untested.
bullets: Cover htmlToMarkdown, csvToMarkdown, jsonToMarkdown edge cases
Test localeHref and alternatesFor path generation logic
Add vitest config and npm test script to package.json

cards.title: Add competitor comparison pages
cards.rationale: Intercom, Zendesk, and Tidio all ship vs-pages capturing high-intent search traffic.
bullets: Reuse PricingTable data to build feature matrix component
Register new routes in sitemap.ts with 0.7 priority

cards.title: Add guided interactive product demo page
cards.rationale: DemoWidget loads the chat passively — no guided tour showcases multilingual chat or voice.
bullets: New /demo page with step-by-step annotated walkthrough
Highlight multilingual chat, voice, and lead capture flows
End with signup CTA tied to trial conversion

cards.title: Add SoftwareApplication schema to tool pages
cards.rationale: 25+ free tool pages lack structured data — missing rich-result eligibility in search.
bullets: Extend JsonLd.tsx with SoftwareApplication type per tool slug
Include free offer, category, and description from tools.ts
Inject schema via ToolShell shared component
